## Data checklist

- [ ] No private account, payment, billing, or order data is included.
- [ ] Price records include source, confidence, verified date, tax note, and status.
- [ ] Unverified records are marked `needs_review`.
- [ ] No cross-region purchase or payment-workaround guidance was added.
